_comment: OKF substrate config — SETUP copies this to <repo>/.agents/okf/okf.config.json and edits it. Paths resolve relative to THIS file's dir (i.e. .agents/okf/). repoRoot: the repo root ('../..' from .agents/okf/). memoryDir: this repo's memory dir, or '' to skip the lessons substrate. codegraph: the binary name (optional; '' or absent → line-check only, degrades gracefully). noise: path fragments to ignore.
